ast.name: error
ast.source: [obsidian-hide-folders] failed to update obsidian ignore list. the API surface probably changed in an update. please report to https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/issues
ast.target: [obsidian-hide-folders] 更新 Obsidian 忽略列表失败。API 接口可能在更新中发生了变化。请向 https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/issues 报告问题

ast.name: error
ast.source: [obsidian-hide-folders] failed to remove from obsidian ignore list. the API surface probably changed in an update. please report to https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/issues
ast.target: [obsidian-hide-folders] 从 Obsidian 忽略列表中移除失败。API 接口可能在更新中发生了变化。请向 https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/issues 报告问题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The names of the folders to hide, one per line. Either exact folder-names, startsWith::FOLDERPREFIX, or endsWith::FOLDERSUFFIX
ast.target: 要隐藏的文件夹名称，每行一个。可以是精确文件夹名、startsWith::FOLDERPREFIX 或 endsWith::FOLDERSUFFIX

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, 'SOMEFOLDER', 'someFolder', or 'sOmeFoldEr' will all be treated the same and matched.
ast.target: 如果启用，'SOMEFOLDER'、'someFolder' 或 'sOmeFoldEr' 将被视为相同并匹配。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If the configured folders should be hidden or not
ast.target: 配置的文件夹是否应被隐藏

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Excluded files will be hidden in search, graph view, and unlinked mentions, less noticeable in quick switcher and link suggestions.
ast.target: 被排除的文件将在搜索、关系图谱和未链接提及中隐藏，在快速切换器和链接建议中不太明显。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enable there will be no bottom-bar indicator-text telling you if this plugin is active.
ast.target: 如果启用，将没有底部状态栏指示文本告知您此插件是否处于活动状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Report issues or ideas, see the source code and contribute.
ast.target: 报告问题或想法，查看源代码并参与贡献。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you like this open-source plugin, consider a small tip to support my unpaid work.
ast.target: 如果您喜欢这个开源插件，可以考虑小额打赏以支持我的无偿工作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Also hide hidden folders in the https://github.com/pjeby/quick-explorer plugin. Not affiliated with quick-explorer's author.
ast.target: 同时在 https://github.com/pjeby/quick-explorer 插件中隐藏隐藏文件夹。与 quick-explorer 的作者无关。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Folders to hide
ast.target: 要隐藏的文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Ignore upper/lowercase
ast.target: 忽略大小写

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Hide folders
ast.target: 隐藏文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add hidden folders to Obsidian exclusion-list
ast.target: 将隐藏文件夹添加到 Obsidian 排除列表

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Hide bottom status-bar "Folders are Hidden" indicator
ast.target: 隐藏底部状态栏“文件夹已隐藏”指示器
